prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: enemy animation source frame sheet for Orbwalker
Primary request: create an opaque chroma-key source sheet for enemy animation frames to be normalized later.
Subject: same dungeon enemy across eight full-body frames in a 4x2 sheet: idle A, idle B, intent windup, attack strike, block guard, hit reaction, stagger, defeat collapse.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D fantasy character sprite source art, strong combat readability.
Composition/framing: equal-size cells with centered character and consistent padding, no clipping.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid cyan background #00FFFF only.
Color palette: dark steel, worn leather, muted crimson cloth, amber highlights, violet/dark accents allowed except key cyan.
Constraints: exact flat #00FFFF background only; no checkerboard; no gradient; no texture; no shadows/glow/particles touching background; no extra panel/frame/matte backdrop; no text; no watermark.
Avoid: no #00FFFF or near-cyan tones inside any character artwork.
notes: Opaque chroma-key fallback source candidate only; deterministic keyed-alpha extraction required before promotion.
